title: Super Sonic Unit 01
wikitext:
[]: Super Sonic Unit-01? (spoilers) Post by Rei`s Pimp AKA lil`Von » Sat Oct 03, 2009 11:31 am What up peoples!!! Im nebbie here but definatly not a noob to eva. i dicovered it in the 7th grade when it was aired on adult swim. (im an 11th grade junior in high school now) and i was insatantly hooked. Now i was in the middle of watching the subbed cam rip of 2.0 when some message popped up that stopped the video and told me to come back later. but now for my question when unit-01 was running towrd sahaquiels impact point was she running at super sonic speed? it had the huge ring thingys and cars and shit were being blown away (imo from a sonic boom generated from unit 01 breaking the sound barrier) your thoughts?

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Oct 03, 2009 1:04 pm (Disclaimer -- I've not seen 2.0, I'm not interested in 2.0) I would usually ascribe such effects to AT field trickery -- like the blurring you see in the original TV series when they ramp up their AT fields (such as when EVA-01 blows away a lot of surrounding buildings while setting up to catch Sahaquiel).

[]: Post by Axell » Sat Oct 03, 2009 1:21 pm yes it went supersonic, just like in the series. In fact, the way it was done in NGE suggests exaggerated speed beyond mach 1 as parts started elongating, suggesting possibly relativistic speeds. Of course NGE likes to exaggerate science

[]: Post by Rei`s Pimp AKA lil`Von » Sat Oct 03, 2009 9:09 pm Axell wrote: yes it went supersonic, just like in the series. In fact, the way it was done in NGE suggests exaggerated speed beyond mach 1 as parts started elongating, suggesting possibly relativistic speeds. Of course NGE likes to exaggerate science

[]: Post by Alaska Slim » Sat Oct 03, 2009 9:27 pm Rei`s Pimp AKA lil`Von wrote: ok but im also skeptical of an eva being able to brake the sound barrier because in the original series when they try to fight the shadow angel Shinji asks Asuka if shes in position, and she replies baka Shinji evas cant move that fast.

[]: Post by Axell » Sun Oct 04, 2009 1:34 am also, Shinji can make his eva do cooler things because his synch ratio can go higher than Asuka's

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Oct 04, 2009 11:33 am Basically: It was magic.

[]: Post by Axell » Sun Oct 04, 2009 12:02 pm that too

[]: Post by Rei`s Pimp AKA lil`Von » Sun Oct 04, 2009 12:08 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Basically: It was magic.

[]: Post by cambaprecoz » Sun Oct 04, 2009 8:46 pm "A wizard did it" is an universally accepted responce in this boards. Off course, that doesn't stop us from fanwanking. Which is fun.

[]: Post by CyberXIII » Sun Oct 04, 2009 9:07 pm Well, he did something similar in the original series when they fought Sahaquiel the first time. My guess is that they just prettied it up this time.

[]: Post by Rei`s Pimp AKA lil`Von » Mon Oct 05, 2009 7:36 am CyberXIII wrote: Well, he did something similar in the original series when they fought Sahaquiel the first time. My guess is that they just prettied it up this time.

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Oct 05, 2009 7:38 am Shinji used the force. Remember? The children have high midachlorian counts.

[]: Post by toe mash » Mon Oct 05, 2009 8:59 am Rei`s Pimp AKA lil`Von wrote: Really? i dont remember that. what episode number was that?

[]: Post by master_lloyd » Mon Oct 05, 2009 9:13 am Unit-01 is not only going supersonic, but it's also tapping into the speedforce. Anime and comic books. Clearly, I get all the bitches...

[]: Post by cambaprecoz » Mon Oct 05, 2009 6:08 pm I'd like to add that I disliked they took out the blurring effect 01 had when it hit supersonic speed, plus that slight whistle sound that accompanied it. They replaced it with 01 doing the stupid "Sonic with your arms back" run. I would have like it better if it was more like the original only longer and the whistle sound was changed to something like an airplane taking off. God that would rule.

[]: Post by NAveryW » Mon Oct 05, 2009 9:24 pm I finally get to use this!

[]: Post by Axell » Mon Oct 05, 2009 10:55 pm that sir is the most beautiful thing i've seen today

[]: Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Mon Oct 05, 2009 10:56 pm *Insert Sonic the Hedgehog theme music here*

[]: Post by Alaska Slim » Tue Oct 06, 2009 12:19 am Sonic the Hedgehog Music - Title Screen TV series themes Sonic Adventure - Sonic's Theme Song - It Doesn't Matter Live & Learn
